result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 3:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_case_counts AS (
    SELECT ownerid,
           COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
    GROUP BY ownerid
),
filtered_cases AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON c.ownerid = occ.ownerid
    WHERE occ.total_cases_handled > 1
      AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS closed_cases_not_transferred,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM filtered_cases
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_case_counts AS (
    SELECT ownerid,
           COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
    GROUP BY ownerid
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
           ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
          AND ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
    JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON c.ownerid = occ.ownerid
    WHERE occ.total_cases_handled > 1
      AND ch.id IS NULL
      AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM non_transferred_cases
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_case_counts AS (
    SELECT ownerid,
           COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
    GROUP BY ownerid
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
    SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
    FROM "Case" c
    LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
           ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
          AND ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
    JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON c.ownerid = occ.ownerid
    WHERE occ.total_cases_handled > 1
      AND ch.id IS NULL
      AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
)
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM non_transferred_cases
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
